Tech Portal
My Photos
How It Works
Your platform guide
Everything you need to know about how My Nail Connection works and how to get the most out of your listing.
How the Browse Feed Works
When a client opens Browse by Style, they see a scrollable grid of real nail photos from techs across the app. This is your primary discovery surface — where a client falls in love with a set and taps through to your profile.
The feed uses a smart weighted rotation:
Every tech is included. Even one great photo gets you into the feed.
More photos = more appearances. The algorithm gives more rotation weight to techs with larger portfolios — but with diminishing returns so smaller techs still get seen.
No one dominates. An interleave rule ensures at least 3 other photos show before yours repeats — so the feed always feels fresh to the client.
It reshuffles every visit. Different photos surface each time a client opens the app, so your whole portfolio gets exposure over time.
PHOTOS
FREQUENCY
WHAT IT MEANS
1 photo
Baseline
In the feed. Be seen.
5 photos
2.2× more
Starter max
10 photos
3.2× more
Spotlight range
25+ photos
5× more
Glow Up max
How Clients Browse by Style
Clients use Browse by Style in two ways — make sure your profile is ready for both.
FIND A TECH MODE
The default. Clients see a 2-column photo grid with your name on each photo. They can filter by distance (25, 50, 100, 250 miles), so photos from techs outside their range are hidden. A complete address is critical here. Tapping a photo goes directly to your profile.
GET INSPO MODE
A pure photo experience — 3-column tight grid, no names, no distance filter. Clients scroll for inspiration from anywhere in the country and save looks they love. Your work still appears here regardless of where the client is located.
Both modes use the same smart feed rotation. More photos = more appearances in both modes.
Your Plan Options
Starter
Free forever
Profile · 5 portfolio photos · availability toggles · posts · Call & Text contact. Everything you need to get started and start being found.
Spotlight
$5 / 10 photos
Build out your showcase, one pack at a time. 10 photos for $5 — half the per-photo cost. No subscription, no commitment. Perfect when business is steady and you want a clean, growing portfolio clients can browse.
Your work lives in your portfolio. Glow Up adds the live feed on top.
Glow Up
$10.99 / month
Keep the feed fresh all month long. Up to 40 uploads a month — plenty for a new look every day, with room to spare for busy weeks. Every photo lands in front of clients browsing fresh work, and your portfolio grows with it. Refills on your monthly anniversary.
Cancel any time
Every tier grows your portfolio. Glow Up uploads also land in the live feed, where clients discover fresh work.
Tagging Your Photos
When a client filters by shape, type, or style, only photos tagged with those selections appear. Good tags = the right clients finding you.
NAIL SHAPE
Square · Round · Oval · Almond · Coffin · Stiletto · Squoval · Lipstick
NAIL TYPE
Acrylic · Hard Gel · Soft Gel · Gel-X · Dip Powder · PolyGel · Silk Wrap · Press-On
NAIL STYLE
Solid Color · French Manicure · Deep French · Reverse French · Ombré · Nail Art · Glitter · Chrome · Cat Eye · Matte · Milky/Sheer · Jelly Nails · Aura Nails · Marble · 3D Nails · Encapsulated · Bling/Rhinestones
Tip: Tag every photo with all three categories. A client searching "Almond + Soft Gel + Chrome" will only see photos tagged with all three — the more accurately you tag, the better your match rate.
Tips for Getting the Most Out of MNC
1
Start with your 5 best photos
Quality over quantity on the free plan. Pick photos that show your strongest, most consistent work — the kind that makes a client say "I want that."
2
Toggle availability every morning
The "Available Now" filter is one of the most used client features. Toggling on takes 2 seconds and puts you at the top of same-day searches.
3
Post at least once a week
Posts show on your profile and keep it looking active. Share a promo, a new set you are proud of, or just that you have openings this week.
4
Upgrade when it is paying for itself
Glow Up unlocks the live feed — up to 40 uploads a month, enough for a new look every day with room for busy weeks. Every upload surfaces to clients browsing fresh work. If one new client from MNC covers the cost many times over, that is your moment. Let the results tell you when you are ready.

Refills on your monthly anniversary · Cancel any time
Glow Up — $10.99/month auto-renewable subscription. Renews monthly until canceled. Manage or cancel anytime in iOS Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions.
By subscribing you agree to our Terms of Use (EULA) and Privacy Policy.
Restore previous purchases
Reset Password
Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
Delete your account?
This cannot be undone. We'll permanently delete:
  • Your profile, photos, and portfolio
  • Your messages and feed posts
  • Your subscription history (any active subscription will end)
  • Your sign-in credentials
Note: deletion removes your MNC account and all your data. If you have an active Glow Up subscription, it will continue billing through the App Store, Google Play, or Stripe until you cancel it separately there. Deleting your account here does not trigger that cancellation.
Manage my subscriptions ›
What's glitchy?
Tell us what's happening — broken button, weird error, something that just feels off — and we'll dig in. An admin will text you back at the number on your profile.
